race.description: Tradies Race Day @ Grc Fri 28 Aug 2026 Hcp (Bm64)
race.comment: MISS FARNAN (7) deep into the prep and can take control early and prove hard to run down. Faded late with the 59.5kg when safely held to run second. Will give a ton of cheek again in a competitive contest. WHACK ATTACK (5) progressive gelding resuming. Came to the end of his prep with a solid on-pace fifth over 1600m at Kembla Grange last January. Primed with the two trials and expected to sprint well fresh. PRINZERRO (4) fourth-up for this and will appreciate the claim from the sticky gate. Much better performance when fifth over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Can take a hand in the finish. VIS I DO (13) raced much closer to the speed first-up with an encouraging third over 1200m at Illawarra Grange. Gets in light again with the claim and expected to play a leading role.
